comparison_version: v4.1.4.11 control sweep: +4 dB versus +10 dB versus +12 dB Sub Harmonics
device: replace with route device, such as speakers, headphones, Android, wired DAC, or Bluetooth
route: replace with RootlessJamesDSP, JDSP4Linux, WSL/JDSP, wired, Bluetooth, speaker, or headphone route

material.label: dense electronic or modern pop item, local title redacted if public
material.license_scope: local listening only unless this is public-domain material
material.comparison_target: +4 dB versus +10 dB versus +12 dB Sub Harmonics on accepted v4.1.4.11
material.timestamp_or_excerpt: replace with local timestamp or excerpt window
material.notes: Listen for limiter pressure, bass blur, kick softening, low-end crowding, loudness retreat, and fatigue.

material.label: hip-hop or trap-sub item, local title redacted if public
material.license_scope: local listening only unless this is public-domain material
material.comparison_target: +4 dB versus +10 dB versus +12 dB Sub Harmonics on accepted v4.1.4.11
material.timestamp_or_excerpt: replace with local timestamp or excerpt window
material.notes: Listen for kick and sub separation, punch loss, bass-image attachment, and practical loudness retreat.

material.label: bass-light or acoustic-bass control item, local title redacted if public
material.license_scope: local listening only unless this is public-domain material
material.comparison_target: +4 dB versus +10 dB versus +12 dB Sub Harmonics on accepted v4.1.4.11
material.timestamp_or_excerpt: replace with local timestamp or excerpt window
material.notes: Listen for whether elevated settings unnecessarily pull broadband level down or detach bass weight from the image.

observations.bass: replace with whether elevated settings add useful weight, blur bass, crowd the low end, or feel over-controlled
observations.punch: replace with whether kick/transient punch stays intact or softens at +10/+12 dB
observations.center_image: replace with whether vocal, kick, snare, or centered anchors stay stable
observations.lateral_spread: replace with whether side energy spreads naturally or becomes exaggerated
observations.localization_blur: replace with whether source positions smear, wander, or stay easy to locate
observations.depth_impression: replace with whether depth stays believable or collapses/flattens
observations.bass_image_coupling: replace with whether bass weight stays attached to kick/center/main image
observations.width: replace with whether elevated bass changes perceived width or hollows the center
observations.air: replace with whether elevated settings indirectly dull or preserve high-frequency air
observations.harshness: replace with whether limiter pressure or level changes make the presentation sharper or smoother
observations.loudness: replace with whether +10/+12 dB feel practically quieter after fair listening-level handling
observations.fatigue: replace with whether elevated settings increase short-session fatigue or pressure
observations.route_context: replace with speaker/headphone/Bluetooth/wired/WSL route context and crossfeed state
observations.artifacts: replace with any pumping, breathing, clipping impression, crackle, image instability, or none heard
observations.overall: replace with no_decision, watch item, close investigation, or candidate-hypothesis recommendation
